commit.message:
Fix DST timezone bug in ical-query.sh JSON output

The ical CLI returns UTC timestamps in JSON mode. LLMs doing mental
UTC→local conversion get DST wrong (used -6/CST instead of -5/CDT).
Post-process JSON output through Python to convert start_date/end_date
to America/Chicago local time before the LLM sees it. Falls back to
raw output if conversion fails. Table/plain output unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: send credentials in request body so config reload works in Docker

The UI and API containers have separate filesystems, so writing .env
inside the UI container never reached the API. The reload endpoint now
accepts credentials in the POST body and injects them into os.environ
before reloading settings. Also adds local build directives to
docker-compose.yml for api and ui services.

fix: Handle non-JSON edge function responses and surface chunk insert errors

- Redeploy api-documents with verify_jwt=false (matches other edge functions)
  so Supabase gateway doesn't return HTML for JWT issues
- Parse edge function response as text first, then JSON.parse with try/catch
  to avoid "Unexpected token '<'" crashes when server returns HTML
- Check for active session before calling edge function
- Throw on first chunk insert failure to surface FK/RLS errors immediately
  instead of silently failing all chunks

walk time, frequency label, and Walk Score pills. Fallback to
transit_access.primary_stop when urban_access is absent.

on QUIET severity — no changes needed.

group spacing (title→summary-row→insight→content), mobile + print overrides.

rows (Health, Dimensions, Neighborhood, Parks, Getting Around) and 5
intentionally lack them (Community, School, EJScreen, How We Score, Local Services).

commit.message:
fix: add fallback for missing increment_quote_counter RPC function (#147)

Root cause: the increment_quote_counter PostgreSQL function was never
deployed to Supabase, causing generateQuoteNumber to fail on every
website quote submission. The error was silently swallowed until PR #146.

- Add optimistic SELECT+UPDATE fallback when RPC function is unavailable
- Auto-seed staff_quote_counter from highest existing quote_number to
  avoid collisions with D1-originated quotes
- Add console.error to staff_quotes dual-write catch handler for
  visibility in Workers logs alongside Sentry

fix: comments broken — schema expected `content`, frontend sends `body`

CommentThread.tsx sends. API route destructures `body` as `content`
for DB insert. All entity types (goals, tasks, etc) were returning 400.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: convert social-media-auditor to Netlify Functions v2 with explicit route registration

The /api/* → /.netlify/functions/:splat redirect in netlify.toml is broken
for all v1 functions (exports.handler) in production — they return 404.
Converting to v2 (export default + config.path) registers the route directly,
bypassing the redirect entirely. This is how send-proposal-email and
generate-proposal-ai already work successfully.

All Gemini logic, timeouts, error handling, and three modes (audit,
score-posts, deep-intake) are preserved intact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

prompt: 补充分类消歧规则 + 摘要改为具体行动导向

A. 分类边界消歧：
- 平台政策 vs 消费者保护 vs 经营合规：按法规主体（平台/政府）区分
- 未成年人保护 vs 内容监管：按焦点（谁能玩 vs 内容本身）区分
- 数据隐私：即使涉及儿童数据，核心是数据处理时仍选数据隐私

B. 摘要格式：
- 移除"紧急/高优/中优"空洞定性词
- 改为要求输出具体合规行动（须更新 XX / 须于 X 日前完成 XX）
- 要求明确写出截止日期或生效时间（若已知）
